steps: resolve the target collection, the documented page-size param, and the documented offset param from the runtime brief by role
set the page-size param to the documented page size and the offset param to 0
issue the read-only GET for the first page via the harness
record the returned result array and the total/offset/page-size metadata for the overlap-and-gap baseline
resolve the target collection and the documented page-size/offset params by role
set the page-size param to the documented page size and the offset param to one page in
issue the read-only GET for the middle page via the harness
record the returned result array for the overlap-and-gap baseline
resolve the target collection and the documented page-size/offset params by role
set the offset param to the last page boundary derived from the documented total
issue the read-only GET for the last partial page via the harness
record the partial result array for the overlap-and-gap baseline
resolve the target collection and the documented page-size/offset params by role
set the offset param past the documented total
issue the read-only GET for the beyond-last page via the harness
assert a success status with an empty result array, never an error
resolve the target collection and the documented page-size param by role
omit the page-size param entirely so the documented default applies
issue the read-only GET via the harness
assert the result count matches the documented default page size
resolve the target collection and the documented page-size param by role
set the page-size param to the documented value that means return all items
issue the read-only GET via the harness
assert the documented behavior is return all items, never an empty page
resolve the target collection and the documented page-size param by role
set the page-size param above the documented total
issue the read-only GET via the harness
assert the result count is capped at the documented total
resolve the target collection and the documented metadata field names by role
issue the read-only GET for a bounded page via the harness
assert the documented total, offset, and page-size metadata fields are present in the body
assert each metadata field is correct for the requested window
resolve the target collection and the documented page-size/offset params by role
walk consecutive pages of the documented page size via the harness
assert no id appears on more than one page (zero overlap) against the ordered baseline
assert every baseline id appears on exactly one page (zero gaps) against the ordered baseline
resolve the target collection and the documented page-size/offset params by role
issue each invalid-param probe (negative page size, negative offset, non-numeric page-size, non-numeric offset) as a read-only GET via the harness
assert each probe is rejected with a client-error class or handled per the documented fallback
record each probe's real response for the report
